title: Zen Mode & App Locks! 🧘
message: Take your focus to the next level with our brand new features designed to keep you distraction-free.
points: Zen Focus Mode: Lock your phone down for a set time.
App Locks: Set daily usage limits and schedules.
Custom Searches: Search inside specific apps right from the home screen.

title: Critical Bug Fixes & Hidden Space
message: Important updates and the highly requested Hidden Apps feature.
points: Hidden Space: Secure apps with Biometrics or a PIN.
Fixed battery drain issue on the home screen.
